pipelineStages.notes: Firestore + seed JSON fallback. loadCatalogBundle() works offline.
extractSeriesDistinctive + deriveSearchTerms. 2,433 unique queries for 1,137 figures.

pipelineStages.blockReason: Marketplace Insights API requires eBay approval. Finding API decommissioned. All production runs use fixture mode.
pipelineStages.notes: Per-query retry (3x), rate-limit detection, dedup by itemId. Fixture mode fully functional.
Full structural normalize + noise/exclude pipeline. Edge case corpus at edge_case_titles.txt.
Generalized (Sprint 3E.2). 1137/1144 MATCHABLE. 137 borderline-distinctive figures unvalidated against real listings. BIE regression: 7/7 passing.
median, average, min, max. Handles empty input (all nulls).
In-memory only. No Firestore write. Document shape is minimal (8 fields). No persistence layer.

estimatedQueriesPerDay.note: No dedup between runs today. Cache would reduce this significantly.

estimatedQueriesPerWeek.note: eBay Marketplace Insights rate limits unknown until approval granted.

missingComponents.name: Firestore Persistence
missingComponents.description: Snapshot documents exist in memory only. No collection structure, document IDs, or write logic defined.

missingComponents.name: Live eBay Data Source
missingComponents.description: Marketplace Insights API pending eBay approval. No timeline known.

missingComponents.name: Snapshot Scheduler
missingComponents.description: Manual CLI only. No automation, cadence, or trigger mechanism.

missingComponents.name: Observability
missingComponents.description: stdout logging only. No metrics, error reporting, or structured audit logs.

missingComponents.name: Failure Recovery and Checkpointing
missingComponents.description: Per-query retry exists (3x). No per-figure resume, checkpoint state, or partial run recovery.

missingComponents.name: Query Cache / Incremental Refresh
missingComponents.description: 2,433 unique queries per full run. No cache. Deferred until API quota constraints are known.

missingComponents.name: Borderline Series Validation
missingComponents.description: 137 figures across 13 series with 4-7 char distinctives not validated against real eBay listing titles.

missingComponents.name: Flutter Client Snapshot Read Layer
missingComponents.description: market_snapshot_dev_screen.dart exists for dev display. Production Firestore read path and data binding not implemented.

fixture.notes: Fully functional. Used for all current development and testing.

marketplaceInsights.notes: Requires eBay business approval for buy.marketplace.insights scope. OAuth credentials ready. Endpoint path known.

thirdParty.notes: Apify and other marketplace data vendors not assessed for cost, reliability, or TOS compliance.

existingTechDebt.title: Snapshot Query Volume Optimization
existingTechDebt.statusChange: No change. Still deferred until API quotas are known from live runs.

existingTechDebt.title: Sold Listing Data Source Migration
existingTechDebt.statusChange: Critical path. Unblocks entire production pipeline.

existingTechDebt.title: Matcher Coverage Validation
existingTechDebt.statusChange: RESOLVED by Sprint 3E.2 generalization. 1137/1144 MATCHABLE. Item can be closed.

existingTechDebt.title: Catalog Metadata Quality Audit
existingTechDebt.statusChange: Relevant after live data validation. 137 borderline-distinctive figures need real-title testing.

launchChecklist.item: Real sold listings fetched and validated against matcher
Firestore collection structure and document schema designed
Firestore persistence implemented in snapshot pipeline
Flutter client reads snapshots from Firestore (not dev screen)
Snapshot scheduler implemented (Cloud Function, GitHub Action, or cron)
Borderline series (4-7 char distinctive) validated against real listing titles
Query cache strategy selected and documented
Full production dry-run completed (1,144 figures, live API)
Coverage audit re-run on live Marketplace Insights data
API cost and quota review completed
Short-name figure aliases added for ambiguousFigureName figures

recommendation.rationale: End-to-end pipeline implemented and tested in fixture mode. Matcher generalized to 99.4% catalog coverage. No live data, no Firestore persistence, no scheduler. Two P0 blockers (live data source + Firestore persistence) must be resolved before production candidate status.
nextMilestoneRequirements: At least one successful production run validated
